text.title: blurred-roles-team-evolution Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for blurred-roles-team-evolution as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Full blurring expectations on deep domains (security, accessibility, ML eval, monetization) with no specialist backstop.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Full blurring is an anti-pattern in deep domains; keep one depth specialist PM per critical surface as the audit backstop — the Venn model does not mean every PM must be equally broad in every area.

failure-mode.description: Using the Venn model as a hiring filter that shuts out specialists (deep researcher, deep platform PM, deep growth PM).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Skill-blurring expectations in JDs covertly reject candidates the team actually needs; label specialist roles explicitly rather than requiring generalism that doesn't exist in the market.

failure-mode.description: Agent-driven PM evaluations rating PM data fluency from PRDs used as performance inputs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs are biased toward verbose writers and score calibration against PRD length, not insight; use as a discussion seed only, never as a performance or leveling input.
